content.en:
Ye Tian retreated to comprehend the body of innate eternal life, and Feng Guhe also underwent new changes.

The Eternal Tribulation Clan has failed to seize the Innate Eternal Life, and if they continue to stay in the Wind Ancient River, they will lose even more.

Moreover, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor is seriously injured, so he can't stay here, otherwise there is a danger of falling.

As a result, the Eternal Tribulation Clan of the Wind Ancient River withdrew one by one, and the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor regained control of the Wind Ancient River, and turned the Wind Ancient River into a treasure land again, and the formations arranged by the Eternal Tribulation Clan were destroyed one by one.

In this way, there would be no way for the Wind Ancient River to transform into the Eternal Tribulation Domain.

Supreme Eternal Tribulation.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor came back, came to the Heavenly Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, and said ashamedly: "Natural Tribulation Ancestor, I failed!"

The Heavenly Tribulation Ancestor also knew about the situation, although he was very angry, but he also knew that this matter could not be blamed on the Heavenly Ruin Tribulation Ancestor.

Moreover, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor had already killed himself for this operation, and if he was punished again, he was afraid that it would cause dissatisfaction among many clansmen of the Eternal Tribulation Clan.

Therefore, the natural disaster tribulation ancestor said: "I can't blame you for this matter, you go back and heal well, forget about this matter!"

Never mind!

What else can be done?

Can they still be an enemy of the Eternal Realm powers?

The Eternal Tribulation Clan does not have an Eternal Realm, which is why the Eternal Tribulation Clan has never dared to go out, if there is an Eternal Realm, they don't need to be afraid of anything.

Gradually, the matter of innate eternal life passed.

......

Three years have passed.

At this time, the human race has developed rapidly, and a large number of invincible people have been born, and Ye Jinpeng has cultivated to the realm of first-class invincibles.

Moreover, Ye Tian's wife, children, and sisters have all cultivated to the realm of first-class invincibles under the supply of her resources.

Now, Ye Jinpeng is condensing the Eternal Tribulation Body, once the condensation is successful, Ye Tian is ready to hand over the Eternal Source Artifact, the Eternal Soul Wood, to him to help him impact to the Supreme Realm.

Compared with their progress, Ye Tian's progress is great.

He fully comprehended the three tribulations of innate eternal life, during which his mastery of the rules of eternity had surpassed many half-step eternal realms, and he had also created a half-step eternal technique.

Not only that, but his perception of the Eternal Body has reached an incredible level, and without auxiliary resources, he forcibly raised the Endless Eternal Body from the early stage of Dacheng to the peak realm of the middle stage of Dacheng.

It can be said that his strength is much stronger now than before.

"It's time to storm the realm of the Fourfold Supreme One!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He took out the Immortal Source Heart Liquid, and after drinking it in one gulp, he quickly hit the realm of the Fourfold Supreme One, and he didn't feel any shackles during the process.

In fact, even if he didn't take the Immortal Source Heart Liquid, he was afraid that he would be able to break through easily, but in order to be more secure, he still used up the Immortal Source Heart Liquid.

The Quadruple Supreme is much stronger than the Triple Superior, and the gap between the Triple Supreme and the Dual Supreme is even greater.

Especially for Ye Tian, his breakthrough made his strength soar many times in an instant.

Now, even if he didn't use the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm, his conventional combat power could reach the level of the Sevenfold Supreme.

If you use that powerful finger of the Eternal Realm, your combat power can soar to the top of the Ninefold Realm, and it can be used more than ten times.

Dozens of Great Tribulation Time has passed, and news came from Ye Jinpeng's side.

Now, Ye Jinpeng has successfully condensed the Eternal Tribulation Body, and he can impact the Supreme Realm with an incomparably deep foundation.

......

"Ancestor!"

Ye Jinpeng came to Ye Tian and said respectfully.

Ye Tian took out the Eternal Soul Wood, handed it to Ye Jinpeng and said: "This is the Eternal Soul Wood of the Golden Ancestor, I extracted the memory of the Golden Ancestor and found it from a forbidden place, the origin you absorbed before belongs to the origin of the Eternal Soul Wood, you can perfectly absorb its origin and impact it to the Supreme Realm, take it!"

"Thank you, Ancestor!" Ye Jinpeng said excitedly.

O Supreme One!

This is the realm he dreams of, once he breaks through to this realm, he will be at the top level in the Tianlin Realm, which is enough to be compared to the Heavenly Wind Source God.

Ye Jinpeng took the Eternal Soul Wood and retreated in the Void Source Hall to impact the Supreme Realm.

For him, this place was safer than the Tianlin Realm.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian didn't pay attention to Ye Jinpeng's breakthrough, because this was 100% successful, if Ye Jinpeng could break through and fail like this, it would be too wasteful, enough to break the record.

Finally, on this day, Ye Jinpeng broke through successfully and stepped into the realm of the supreme.

After Ye Jinpeng broke through, the origin of the Dark Forbidden Domain skyrocketed again.

"Break through, if you cultivate another supreme being, the dark forbidden realm should be able to become an eternal world!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The next most promising breakthrough is Ye Xingchen, Ye Tian is ready to let Ye Xingchen fuse the power of the ancient star stone, so that he can condense the ancient star, even if it is a broken ancient star.

For this reason, he needed to prepare countless precious resources to help Ye Xingchen grow, otherwise Ye Xingchen would not be able to comprehend the ancient astral body at all, and it would be useless to cultivate hundreds of millions of tribulation yuan.

In order to allow Ye Xingchen to smoothly condense the ancient astral body, Ye Tian also re-fused an ancient astral body Eternal Ancestral Endowment and gave it to Ye Xingchen.

Coupled with the provision of countless resources, Ye Xingchen can now be regarded as having initially created an ancient astral body suitable for himself, but the degree of damage is relatively serious, but it is also comparable to the lower eternal body.

This is also the ultimate that Ye Tian can do.

However, in Ye Tian's expectations, if Ye Xingchen wanted to break through to the Supreme Realm, it would take at least a hundred Tribulation Yuan, which still required countless resource supplies, otherwise, at least tens of thousands of Tribulation Yuan or even more.

For Ye Xingchen's cultivation plan, Ye Tian arranged it.

Other times, Ye Tian didn't worry about it.

Unconsciously, another ten tribulation times had passed, and Ye Tian had also raised his cultivation to the peak realm of the Fourfold Supreme, and the next step was to impact the Fourfold Supreme realm.

The Void Source Hall happened to have a treasure suitable for impacting the realm of the Fivefold Supreme One, Ye Tian had never been willing to use it before, after all, it was too wasteful to use it at a low level.

This treasure is the green glass fire crystal.

Subsequently, Ye Tian used the Qingli Fire Yan Crystal to break through, and he also broke through to the realm of the Fivefold Supreme One very easily.

After breaking through to the realm of the Fivefold Supreme One, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed again.

With his current strength, his conventional combat power was enough to rival the weaker Eight Tops.

And he can also use the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm completely, as long as it is not long, the burden on the body will not be very large.

At this time, Ye Tian could be completely equivalent to a true Ninefold Supreme Being.
